<!-- -*- mode: markdown -*- -->

---
title: "SAM: System Status Database"
author: "CISL"
date: last-modified
---

## System Status Dashboard & Database

 - **SAM** is CISL's resource allocation and accounting system for NCAR HPC infrastructure.

    - The SAM WebApp **Status Dashboard** displays curent and historical usage information

    - This ...

# `collectors`

## `collectors` - update scripts


## `collectors` - `python` object



# `system_status` Database

## FIXME
